discount_threshold.quote_span: If Customer's aggregate annual contract value across all active Statements of Work exceeds two hundred fifty thousand dollars ($250,000) in any contract year, Provider shall issue a credit equal to ten percent (10%) of amounts invoiced in excess of that threshold

renewal_term.quote_span: This Agreement shall not renew automatically. At least ninety (90) days before the end of the Initial Term, the parties may negotiate and execute a written amendment extending the term for an additional period on mutually agreed conditions; absent such a signed amendment, this Agreement terminates at the end of the Initial Term.
